ns0:entry.ns0:title: AliSoftware/OHHTTPStubs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AliSoftware/OHHTTPStubs
Language: objective-c
Stub your network requests easily! Test your apps with fake network data and custom response time, response code and headers!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MortimerGoro/MGSwipeTableCell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MortimerGoro/MGSwipeTableCell
Language: objective-c
An easy to use UITableViewCell subclass that allows to display swippable buttons with a variety of transitions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
Language: objective-c
A Minecraft: Java Edition Launcher for Android and iOS based on Boardwalk. Succeeded by https://github.com/AngelAuraMC/Amethyst-iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SoCuul/SCInsta
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SoCuul/SCInsta
Language: objective-c
A feature-rich tweak for Instagram on iOS!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TTTAttributedLabel/TTTAttributedLabel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TTTAttributedLabel/TTTAttributedLabel
Language: objective-c
A drop-in replacement for UILabel that supports attributes, data detectors, links, and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bugsnag/bugsnag-cocoa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bugsnag/bugsnag-cocoa
Language: objective-c
BugSnag error monitoring & exception reporter for iOS, macOS, tvOS and watchOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dzenbot/DZNEmptyDataSet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dzenbot/DZNEmptyDataSet
Language: objective-c
A drop-in UITableView/UICollectionView superclass category for showing empty datasets whenever the view has no content to display

ns0:entry.ns0:title: geode-sdk/ios-launcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/geode-sdk/ios-launcher
Language: objective-c
Manages installing and launching Geometry Dash for iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gnachman/iTerm2
Language: objective-c
iTerm2 is a terminal emulator for Mac OS X that does amazing things.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/promises
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/promises
Language: objective-c
Promises is a modern framework that provides a synchronization construct for Swift and Objective-C.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ibireme/YYText
Language: objective-c
Powerful text framework for iOS to display and edit rich text.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/joeldev/JLRoutes
Language: objective-c

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/michaeltyson/TPKeyboardAvoiding
Language: objective-c

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nicklockwood/FXPageControl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nicklockwood/FXPageControl
Language: objective-c
Simple, drop-in replacement for the iPhone UIPageControl that allows customisation of the dot colour, size and spacing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opa334/TrollStore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opa334/TrollStore
Language: objective-c
Jailed iOS app that can install IPAs permanently with arbitary entitlements and root helpers because it trolls Apple

ns0:entry.ns0:title: realm/realm-swift
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/realm/realm-swift
Language: objective-c
Realm is a mobile database: a replacement for Core Data & SQLite
